qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evaluacion AS ID, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS TEXT, EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evento AS PID FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, EVA02_EVALUACION JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_personal_emp WHERE EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evaluacion = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EVA01_EVENTOS.oi_evento AS ID, EVA01_EVENTOS.c_evento AS CODE, EVA01_EVENTOS.d_evento AS TEXT, EVA01_EVENTOS.oi_empresa AS PID FROM EVA01_EVENTOS WHERE EVA01_EVENTOS.oi_evento = {#SOURCE:@PID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa AS ID, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa AS CODE, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa AS TEXT FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS WHERE ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa AS ID, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa AS CODE, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa AS TEXT FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS WHERE ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EVA01_EVENTOS.oi_evento AS ID, EVA01_EVENTOS.c_evento AS CODE, EVA01_EVENTOS.d_evento AS TEXT FROM EVA01_EVENTOS WHERE EVA01_EVENTOS.c_evento={substring_before(#SOURCE:@SUB_SEARCH,\'-\')} AND EVA01_EVENTOS.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PARENTID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evaluacion ID, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom TEXT, EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evento PID FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, EVA02_EVALUACION JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_personal_emp WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo={substring_before(#SOURCE:@SUB_SEARCH,\'-\')} AND EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evento={#SOURCE:@PARENTID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:define.declare: <ROW text="NATAM S.A.-cv-RUBINICH, MARIANA" code="01-cv-161" value="1" id="1"/>
qry:define.name: HELP

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EVA01_EVENTOS.oi_evento AS ID, EVA01_EVENTOS.c_evento AS CODE, EVA01_EVENTOS.d_evento AS TEXT FROM EVA01_EVENTOS WHERE EVA01_EVENTOS.oi_evento={#SOURCE:@PARENTID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evaluacion AS ID, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS TEXT, EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evento AS PID FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, EVA02_EVALUACION JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_personal_emp WHERE EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evento={#SOURCE:@PARENTID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EVA01_EVENTOS.oi_evento AS ID, EVA01_EVENTOS.c_evento AS CODE, EVA01_EVENTOS.d_evento AS TEXT FROM EVA01_EVENTOS WHERE EVA01_EVENTOS.oi_evento={#SOURCE:@PARENTID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evento FROM EVA02_EVALUACION WHERE EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evaluacion={#SOURCE:@ID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evaluacion AS ID, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS TEXT, EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evento AS PID FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, EVA02_EVALUACION JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_personal_emp WHERE EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evento={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ')/ROWS/ROW
